zh.lifeSummary: 當Onguen de Crozon於1025年出生在法國時，她的父親Riwallon de Crozon25歲，母親Wife Riwallon de Crozon21歲。她和Orscand De Cornouaille III至少有5個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1084年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Onguen de Crozon于1025年出生在法国时，她的父亲Riwallon de Crozon25岁，母亲Wife Riwallon de Crozon21岁。她和Orscand De Cornouaille III至少有5个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1084年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crozon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Croston
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire named Croston, from Old Norse kross ‘cross’ or Old English cros + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.
English: occasionally, a variant of   Croxton   or   Croson  .

en.lifeSummary: When Onguen de Crozon was born in 1025, in France, her father, Riwallon de Crozon, was 25 and her mother, Wife Riwallon de Crozon, was 21. She had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Orscand De Cornouaille III. She died after 1084.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Onguen de Crozon est née en 1025, à France, son père, Riwallon de Crozon, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Wife Riwallon de Crozon, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Orscand De Cornouaille III. Elle est décédée après 1084.

de.lifeSummary: Als Onguen de Crozon 1025 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Riwallon de Crozon 25 und ihre Mutter Wife Riwallon de Crozon 21. Sie hatte mit Orscand De Cornouaille III mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1084.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Onguen de Crozon è nata il nel 1025 nel Francia, sua padre, Riwallon de Crozon, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Wife Riwallon de Crozon, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con Orscand De Cornouaille III. Morì dopo il 1084.

ja.Cornouaille, Bretagne, France: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディ
ja.lifeSummary: Onguen de Crozonが1025年にフランスで生まれた時，父Riwallon de Crozonは25歳，母Wife Riwallon de Crozonは21歳であった。彼女はOrscand De Cornouaille IIIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1084年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Onguen de Crozon(이)가 1025년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Riwallon de Crozon(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wife Riwallon de Crozon(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Orscand De Cornouaille III(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1084년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Onguen de Crozon nasceu em 1025, em França, seu pai, Riwallon de Crozon, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Wife Riwallon de Crozon, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com Orscand De Cornouaille III. Ela faleceu após 1084.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Onguen de Crozon родилась в 1025 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Riwallon de Crozon было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Wife Riwallon de Crozon, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Orscand De Cornouaille III. Она умерла после 1084 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Onguen de Crozon nació en 1025, en Francia, su papá, Riwallon de Crozon, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Wife Riwallon de Crozon, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con Orscand De Cornouaille III. Murió después de 1084.
